# growthbook_fact_table (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook fact table by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique fact table identifier.

### Read-Only

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the fact table is archived.
- `columns` (Attributes List) Column definitions derived from the SQL. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--columns))
- `datasource` (String) Data source ID.
- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `description` (String) Fact table description.
- `event_name` (String) Event name used in SQL template variables.
- `managed_by` (String) Where the fact table is managed from.
- `name` (String) Fact table name.
- `owner` (String) Owner userId or email address.
- `projects` (List of String) Associated project IDs.
- `sql` (String) SQL query that defines the fact table.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags associated with the fact table.
- `user_id_types` (List of String) Identifier columns available in the query.

<a id="nestedatt--columns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `columns`

Read-Only:

- `always_inline_filter` (Boolean) Always include this column as an inline filter.
- `auto_slices` (List of String) Specific slices to automatically analyze.
- `column` (String) Actual column name in the SQL query.
- `datatype` (String) Column data type.
- `date_created` (String) Column creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Column last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `deleted` (Boolean) Whether the column has been deleted.
- `description` (String) Column description.
- `is_auto_slice_column` (Boolean) Whether this column supports auto slice analysis.
- `locked_auto_slices` (List of String) Slices protected from automatic updates.
- `name` (String) Display name for the column.
- `number_format` (String) Number format hint.
